nodes.name: Schedule: Mon/Wed/Fri 9am
nodes.notes:
Runs every Monday, Wednesday, Friday at 09:00.
Cron: 0 9 * * 1,3,5
Change timezone in n8n settings: GENERIC_TIMEZONE

parameters.query:
SELECT id, topic, retry_count
FROM article_topics
WHERE status = 'pending'
  AND (scheduled_at IS NULL OR scheduled_at <= NOW())
ORDER BY created_at ASC
LIMIT 1
FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED;

nodes.name: Topic Available?
nodes.notes: If no pending topic, stop gracefully

nodes.name: Generate Article via LLM
nodes.notes:
Uses OpenAI GPT-4o. Swap URL/model for Anthropic Claude, Mistral, etc.
Credential: HTTP Header Auth with Authorization: Bearer <LLM_API_KEY>

parameters.subject: =📝 New Article Ready: {{ $json.title }}
parameters.html:
=

📝 New Article Generated

n8n Auto-Publisher

Topic: {{ $json.topic }}
Title: {{ $json.title }}
Word Count: {{ $json.word_count }} words
Generated: {{ $json.generated_at }}
Topic ID: #{{ $json.topic_id }}
Tags: {{ $json.tags.map(t => '#' + t + '').join('') }}

Article Content (Markdown)

{{ $json.article }}

Generated by n8n auto-publisher on Kubernetes. To publish on Dev.to, copy the Markdown content above.

To submit a new topic: POST https://n8n.yourdomain.com/webhook/submit-topic

nodes.name: Dev.to Token Available?
nodes.notes: Optional: only publish to Dev.to if DEV_TOKEN env var is set

nodes.name: Publish Draft to Dev.to
nodes.notes: Creates article as DRAFT on Dev.to. Change 'published': true to auto-publish.

parameters.query:
UPDATE article_topics
SET 
  status = 'done',
  processed_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $('Parse & Format Article').first().json.topic_id }};

UPDATE article_topics
SET 
  status = CASE WHEN retry_count >= 3 THEN 'failed' ELSE 'pending' END,
  retry_count = retry_count + 1,
  error_msg = 'Generation or delivery failed - will retry',
  scheduled_at = NOW() + INTERVAL '1 hour'
WHERE id = {{ $('Mark Topic as Processing').first().json[0].id }};

nodes.name: No Pending Topic - Stop
nodes.notes: No pending topics in queue - execution ends gracefully
